title: cordia oblongifolia
intro: Cordia oblongifolia, also known as the Indian cherry tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Borreria genus in the Rubiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cordia oblongifolia include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Cordia oblongifolia is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
